description: Style Note gliders is a brand that prides itself on providing comfort, style and durability at prices that don& rsquo t burn a hole in your pocket. This pair of floaters with its bright colours scores high on all the aforementioned criteria. Pair it with a graphic T-shirt and cargos for your weekend getaway.Product DetailsRound toed floaters in black, blue and red with fabric forefoot and ankle loop straps mounted in syntheticVelcro closure on the straps for a customised FitSoft rubber footbedRubber outsole with circular nubs and horizontal lugs Material and CareSynthetic, fabric, rubberDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
